sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 14:30:00');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 15:30:00' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT extract('hour' FROM event_time) AS hour_extracted FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT event_id, extract('minute' FROM event_time) AS minute_extracted FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_id = 1;
